title: Ultimate End Update
description: This mod will update the end to a newer version based on what players would like to have
body:
# Ultimate End Update
This mod updates the end to a version based on what players would like to have.
### New In-Game:
- New End Biome : A colorful biome with new structures and entities.
- New type of wood : A slightly yellow wood found in the New End Biome.
- New flowers : The Sabiosa flower and the Soul flower.
- New building blocks : more than 10 blocks that can be found in the new biome and can be used in your builds !
- New Entities : The "Rodagend" an end villager that can convert emeralds in smooth emeralds and it's infected version the "Dead Rodagend".
- New armor : The Emerald armor made with smooth emeralds, each piece will give you a permanent effect (Water Breathing, Health Boost, Regeneration, Speed)

  **And more incoming**

## Other Informations:
- The only supported version of Minecraft is **1.20.4**.
- For a better experience please use a Shader, [Solas Shader V2.3](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader/version/2.3) is perfect for this mod !

## To get Smooth Emeralds (to craft the Emerald armor) you need to right click a Rodagend with an emerald or kill a Dead Rodagend.
